ddls:
CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" TEXT /* ID of the customer who made the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was made */,
  "ship_date" TEXT /* Date the order was shipped */,
  "ship_mode" TEXT /* Mode of shipping (e.g., First Class, Second Class, Same Day) */,
  "order_priority" TEXT /* Priority of the order (e.g., High, Medium, Critical) */,
  "expected_delivery_date" TEXT /* Expected delivery date of the order */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee who handled the order */,
  "market_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market where the order was made */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region where the order was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_market_id FOREIGN KEY ("market_id") REFERENCES markets ("market_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "segment" TEXT /* Segment the customer belongs to (e.g., Consumer, Corporate, Home Office) */,
  "postal_code" INTEGER /* Postal code of the customer's address */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the customer's address */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the customer's address */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the customer's address */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region the customer belongs to (e.g., Central US, Oceania, Western Europe) */,
  "market" TEXT /* Market the customer belongs to (e.g., USCA, Asia Pacific, Europe) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category the product belongs to (e.g., Technology, Furniture) */,
  "sub_category" TEXT /* Sub-category the product belongs to (e.g., Phones, Chairs) */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "sales" REAL /* Sales revenue generated by the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the product */,
  "profit" REAL /* Profit generated by the product */,
  "shipping_cost" REAL /* Shipping cost of the product */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the product */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the product (e.g., length, width, height) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category FOREIGN KEY ("category") REFERENCES product_categories ("category_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_sub_category FOREIGN KEY ("sub_category") REFERENCES product_sub_categories ("sub_category_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_sub_categories" (
  "sub_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sub-category */,
  "sub_category_name" TEXT /* Name of the sub-category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sub-category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sub_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales record */,
  "order_id" TEXT /* ID of the order the sales record belongs to */,
  "product_id" TEXT /* ID of the product the sales record belongs to */,
  "sales" REAL /* Sales revenue generated by the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the product */,
  "profit" REAL /* Profit generated by the product */,
  "shipping_cost" REAL /* Shipping cost of the product */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "markets" (
  "market_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market */,
  "market_name" TEXT /* Name of the market */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the market */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("market_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" TEXT /* ID of the order the order item belongs to */,
  "product_id" TEXT /* ID of the product the order item belongs to */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "sales" REAL /* Sales revenue generated by the product */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the product */,
  "profit" REAL /* Profit generated by the product */,
  "shipping_cost" REAL /* Shipping cost of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipments" (
  "shipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipment */,
  "order_id" TEXT /* ID of the order the shipment belongs to */,
  "ship_date" TEXT /* Date the order was shipped */,
  "ship_mode" TEXT /* Mode of shipping (e.g., First Class, Second Class, Same Day) */,
  "shipping_cost" REAL /* Shipping cost of the order */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number of the shipment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipments_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "employee_name" TEXT /* Full name of the employee */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the employee */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the employee (e.g., Sales Manager, Operations Manager) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the employee belongs to (e.g., Sales, Operations) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_status" (
  "order_status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order status */,
  "order_id" TEXT /* ID of the order the status belongs to */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., Shipped, Delivered, Cancelled) */,
  "status_date" TEXT /* Date the order status was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_status_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "returns" (
  "return_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each return */,
  "order_id" TEXT /* ID of the order the return belongs to */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date the order was returned */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the return */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("return_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "product_id" TEXT /* ID of the product the inventory record belongs to */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in stock */,
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* ID of the warehouse where the product is stored */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_warehouse_id FOREIGN KEY ("warehouse_id") REFERENCES warehouses ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "warehouses" (
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each warehouse */,
  "warehouse_name" TEXT /* Name of the warehouse */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the warehouse */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("warehouse_id")
)
